ashwood_watchspear.name: Ashwood Watchspear
ashwood_watchspear.lore: Carried by village watch patrols, this spear favors control and reliability over brute force.

stitched_hide_jerkin.name: Stitched Hide Jerkin
stitched_hide_jerkin.lore: A practical trail jerkin reinforced with layered hide panels for dependable protection.

thunderpeak_greataxe.name: Thunderpeak Greataxe
thunderpeak_greataxe.lore: Forged by mountain smiths who temper steel in stormwater, this massive axe splits both shield and resolve with a single thunderous arc.

serpent_fang_dagger.name: Serpent-Fang Dagger
serpent_fang_dagger.lore: A wickedly curved blade modeled after the fang of a sand viper, prized by assassins for its speed and venom-channeling grooves.

stormcall_crossbow.name: Stormcall Crossbow
stormcall_crossbow.lore: Inscribed with wind runes along its stock, this crossbow fires quarrels that hum with crackling energy as they streak toward their mark.

dragonscale_breastplate.name: Dragonscale Breastplate
dragonscale_breastplate.lore: Hammered from the shed scales of a young drake, this breastplate gleams with a faint inner heat that turns aside both blade and bolt.

obsidian_tower_shield.name: Obsidian Tower Shield
obsidian_tower_shield.lore: Carved from a single slab of volcanic glass and bound in iron, this tower shield is as unyielding as the mountain it was pulled from.
